fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 62 is incorrect because it uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`). This fails to detect conflicts when time windows are adjacent (touching boundaries), which is required by the tests.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(b__1 >= s and a__1 <= e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The result of the buggy conflict check should match the result of a correct check that considers touching boundaries.

spec.expr: not any(b__1 >= s and a__1 <= e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If the no-conflict branch is taken, there must truly be no conflict, including at the boundaries.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline, after a successful insertion, must not contain any overlapping or touching slots.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result[0] == (not any(window[1] >= s and window[0] <= e for s, e in timeline))

constraints.intent: The returned success flag must accurately reflect whether a conflict-free insertion was possible.
